overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking and jogging along a winding dirt trail through hilly terrain. The character ascends from a densely vegetated path to an open ridge with expansive views of a distant lake and mountain range under a bright partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow hillside trail through dense shrubs and tall grass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up the winding dirt path surrounded by dense vegetation and pine trees

entered.detail: winding dirt path ascending the hillside
tall golden grass lining both sides of the trail
scattered pine trees on the hillside slopes
grassy hillside rising on both sides of the path

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with Geralt walking along a narrow dirt trail enclosed by dense tall grass and shrubs. Pine trees dot the hillside slopes under a bright sky partially visible through the vegetation. The path winds steadily upward through the natural corridor with no other characters or structures in sight.

scene_state.functional_zone: hilltop clearing with panoramic views opening up

events.description: character stops walking and turns around to survey the landscape behind him
character completes his survey and resumes walking forward along the trail

agents.ego_description: pauses at the hilltop to look around at the surrounding hills and valley below before continuing his journey

entered.detail: hazy blue mountains visible on the horizon
expansive view of the sky and distant terrain opening up

segments.scene_description: Reaching a clearing, Geralt stops and turns around to survey the landscape, revealing panoramic views of distant mountains and the valley below. The dense vegetation gives way to a more open hilltop with scattered trees. After a brief pause, he turns back and continues ascending the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky hillside trail with expanding views of distant lake and mountains

events.description: distant lake and mountain range become clearly visible as the trail ascends higher on the ridge

agents.ego_description: jogging along the trail as the landscape opens up to reveal distant water and mountain peaks

entered.detail: large grey boulders and rocky outcrops appearing along the trail sides
large body of water visible in the valley below with misty mountains beyond
layered mountain peaks visible in the hazy distance

segments.scene_description: The trail opens up significantly as Geralt ascends, with large rock formations appearing alongside the path. The vegetation transitions to shorter grass and scattered shrubs. Approximately halfway through, a stunning vista reveals a distant lake and layered mountain ranges in the hazy background as the character continues jogging along the ridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain ridge trail with panoramic views of lake and mountain vista

agents.ego_description: continuing along the ridge path with expansive views of the lake on one side and rolling hills on the other

entered.detail: smaller rocks and stones scattered along the trail edges

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows Geralt along an open ridge trail with panoramic views in all directions. Large boulders line both sides of the path while the distant lake and mountains remain visible in the background, appearing closer as he progresses. The terrain is rocky with sparse vegetation, emphasizing the elevated position above the surrounding landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character ascends from a secluded, vegetated corridor into a vast, open mountain ridge. It begins with Geralt walking along a narrow dirt trail enclosed by dense tall grass and shrubs, winding steadily upward through a natural corridor of pine trees. As the path reaches a clearing, the camera pivots to reveal a panoramic view of the valley and distant mountains before turning back to follow the character's continued ascent. The scene then expands as the trail opens significantly, with the dense greenery transitioning into shorter grass and large rock formations. Finally, the movement culminates in a stunning vista of a distant lake and layered mountain ranges in the hazy background as the character jogs along the high ridge.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement along an elevated ridge trail that gradually brings the distant horizon into sharper focus. It begins by tracking Geralt along an open path where large boulders line both sides of the way, emphasizing the rocky nature of the high terrain. As he progresses, the camera maintains a panoramic perspective, causing the distant lake and mountain range to appear steadily closer against the bright sky. The scene then shifts to highlight the sparse vegetation of the ridge before finally settling on the expansive, unobstructed views of the surrounding landscape.
